entities.name: CHIREDZI DISTRICT
entities.description: A district in semi-arid Zimbabwe susceptible to the adverse effects of climate change and variability

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: The country where the study on rainfed crop-based farming communities was conducted

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns that increase vulnerability in farming communities

entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: Short-term fluctuations in climate conditions affecting smallholder farmers

entities.name: VULNERABILITY
entities.description: The susceptibility of smallholder farmers to the adverse effects of climate change and variability

entities.name: VULNERABILITY TO RESILIENCE FRAMEWORK
entities.description: A framework used to assess the vulnerability of farming communities

entities.name: CLIMATE VULNERABILITY AND CAPACITY FRAMEWORK
entities.description: A framework used to assess the vulnerability of farming communities

entities.name: DROUGHTS
entities.description: A major indicator and driver of vulnerability in the Chiredzi District

entities.name: FLASH FLOODS
entities.description: A major indicator and driver of vulnerability in the Chiredzi District

entities.name: POOR SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: A biophysical driver of vulnerability in the Chiredzi District

entities.name: OUT-MIGRATION
entities.description: A socioeconomic driver of vulnerability leading to female- and child-headed households

entities.name: SENSITIVITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analysis used to determine how different biophysical and socioeconomic indicators influence vulnerability and adaptation

entities.name: CEREAL GRAIN
entities.description: The main crops in the region experiencing a decline in yield due to climatic stimuli

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of cereal grains which has declined due to climate change

entities.name: ADAPTATION MEASURES
entities.description: Recommended actions to counter climate change hazards
